projects.title: AMD Research
questions: What is AMD's durable competitive advantage in the data centre GPU market?
How does AMD's EPYC CPU market share trajectory compare to established competitors over the last four quarters?
What evidence supports long-term margin expansion as the Instinct GPU line scales?
How dependent is AMD's data centre revenue on a small number of hyperscaler customers?

projects.title: NVDA Research
questions: How durable is NVIDIA's data centre GPU market position as competing accelerators mature?
What evidence supports the long-term durability of NVIDIA's CUDA software moat?
How concentrated is NVIDIA's data centre revenue across its largest customers?
